name: Water Elemental
flavour: Living water, ready to drown and crush its foes.

name: Black Earth Cultist
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: Devotion to Ogrémoch gives them an uncanny ability to hold their ground.

name: Crushing Wave Cultist
flavour: Cultists sworn to the service of Olhydra, Princess of Elemental Water.

name: Howling Hatred Cultist
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ +3 influence
flavour: Howling Hatred cultists sustain themselves on nothing more than air and fanatical devotion.

name: Fire Elemental
flavour: A force of capricious devastation.

name: Air Elemental
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ Deploy 3 troops.
flavour: Living tempests, the embodiment of chaos.

name: Earth Elemental
effect: Return another player's troop or spy.
flavour: Who can stand against the might of the earth?

name: Fire Elemental Myrmidon
effect: At end of turn, promote an Obedience card played this turn.
flavour: "What if we put the fire INSIDE the armor?" —Elizar Dryflagon

name: Water Elemental Myrmidon
effect: At end of turn, promote an Obedience card played this turn.
flavour: They exist only to follow the commands of their creator.

name: Earth Elemental Myrmidon
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: "How can you claim this land is yours when the very land itself rises to fight you?" —Marlos Urnrayle

name: Air Elemental Myrmidon
effect: At end of turn, promote an Obedience card played this turn.
flavour: "We'll give armor flight just to mock the earth." —Aerisi Kalinoth

name: Eternal Flame Cultist
flavour: "His embrace will cull the weak and warm the strong." —Vanifer

name: Aerisi Kalinoth
effect: Recruit a Guile card that costs 4 or less without paying its cost.
flavour: "It's hard to remain humble when everyone is beneath you."

name: Gar Shatterkeel
effect: Recruit a Conquest card that costs 4 or less without paying its cost.
flavour: "The tide has turned."

name: Marlos Urnrayle
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
Recruit an Ambition card that costs 4 or less without paying its cost.
flavour: "I blame the gods. How they envied me!"

name: Vanifer
effect: Recruit a Malice card that costs 4 or less without paying its cost.
flavour: "Time to blow the candle out."

name: Olhydra
effect: Supplant a white troop anywhere on the board.
flavour: She is patient as the tide, retreating from adversity only to rush back in stronger than before.

name: Ogrémoch
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
Ambition Focus ▶ At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: What he can't crush, he endures and outlasts.

name: Imix
flavour: "Your world was made for me to consume."

name: Yan-C-Bin
effect: Place a spy, then assassinate a troop at that spy's site.
flavour: Subtler than the other elemental princes, Yan-C-Bin operates unseen.
